notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: UK aid cuts ‘reduce bilateral support to some African countries by 90%’
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 批评者称，外交部数据传递了关于英国想在国际舞台扮演何种角色的全球信息。
articles.summary: 文章根据外交部年度报告，指出工党政府削减外援预算导致未来三年对部分非洲国家的双边援助减少高达90%。批评者认为这向国际社会传达了英国角色转变的负面信号，值得关注其政策影响与争议。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：英国大幅削减对非援助显示其国际角色转变，并引发对全球责任的质疑。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Critics say Foreign Office figures send ‘global message about the role the country wants to play on international stage’ Labour’s foreign aid cuts mean reductions of as much as 90% in the bilateral support the UK will give to some African countries, Foreign Office figures show. The department’s annual report includes a long-awaited breakdown of how the reduction in the aid budget will affect individual countries for the next three years.

zh.title: 英国削减援助，对部分非洲国家双边支持减少90%
zh.highlight: 批评者称，外交部数据传递了关于英国想在国际舞台扮演何种角色的全球信息。
zh.summary: 文章根据外交部年度报告，指出工党政府削减外援预算导致未来三年对部分非洲国家的双边援助减少高达90%。批评者认为这向国际社会传达了英国角色转变的负面信号，值得关注其政策影响与争议。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：英国大幅削减对非援助显示其国际角色转变，并引发对全球责任的质疑。

en.highlight: Critics say the figures send a global message about the role the UK wants to play on the international stage.
en.summary: The article reports that UK's foreign aid cuts will reduce bilateral support to some African countries by up to 90% over the next three years, according to Foreign Office figures. Critics argue this sends a negative signal about the UK's global role. It is worth reading as it details the impact of policy decisions and the debate on international responsibility.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: The UK's sharp reduction in aid to Africa signals a shift in its international role, raising questions about global responsibility.
en.title: UK aid cuts reduce bilateral support to some African countries by 90%

articles.title: Air quality plummets in 20 states as smoke from Canadian wildfires spreads across the US
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 数百万美国人面临从明尼苏达到纽约的空气污染警报。
articles.summary: 文章报道加拿大安大略省野火产生的烟雾扩散至美国20多个州，导致空气质量下降，数百万人收到健康警告。该新闻凸显了跨国环境灾害对公共健康的直接影响，值得关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 跨国野火烟雾的扩散凸显了气候变化的跨境影响，提醒公众关注空气污染对健康的危害。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Millions of Americans face air quality alerts from Minnesota to New York as authorities urge people to stay indoors Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email Smoke from wildfires burning in south-central Canada and parts of Minnesota is spreading across the US, prompting air quality alerts in more than 20 states with millions of Americans expected to face unhealthy air conditions this week. The smoke from the more than 180 active wildfires in northern Ontario briefly made Toronto’s air quality among the worst in the world on Wednesday. By Wednesday night , the smoke had spread across several US states, from Minnesota, where multiple wildfires are also burning, to New York, blanketing the skies in haze and worsening air quality.

zh.failureAnalysis: 跨国野火烟雾的扩散凸显了气候变化的跨境影响，提醒公众关注空气污染对健康的危害。

en.highlight: Millions of Americans face air quality alerts from Minnesota to New York as authorities urge people to stay indoors.
en.summary: The article reports that smoke from wildfires in Canada has spread to over 20 US states, causing severe air quality degradation and health warnings for millions. It highlights the cross-border impact of climate-related disasters and is worth reading for its public health implications.
en.failureAnalysis: Transboundary wildfire smoke underscores the cross-border effects of climate change, a practical constraint on public health that demands attention.
en.title: Air quality plummets in 20 states as smoke from Canadian wildfires spreads across the US

articles.title: Inkling: Our open-weights model
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: Official docs
articles.summary: 本文介绍了Thinking Machines Lab发布的开放权重模型Inkling（975B总参数，41B活跃），采用Apache-2.0许可，具备多模态功能（文本、图像、音频、视频）。虽然并非前沿模型，但因其可微调性和竞争力，为美国开放权重生态增添了新选择。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：该模型定位为定制化基座而非最强模型，其价值在于Apache-2.0许可和Tinker平台微调能力，适合需要多模态基座的开发场景。
articles.highlight: Inkling 不是当今最强的模型，但作为开放权重的基座模型，其多模态能力、高效推理以及Tinker微调平台使其成为良好的定制基础。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Inkling: Our open-weights model Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab just released their first open-weights model. Inkling is "a Mixture-of-Experts transformer with 975B total parameters, 41B active" - an Apache-2.0 licensed multimodal model trained on 45 trillion tokens of text, images, audio and video. They're also promising Inkling-Small, a 276B (12B active) model, but that's still being tested and the weights will be released "once that work is complete".

zh.title: Inkling：一个开放权重的模型发布
zh.highlight: Inkling 不是当今最强的模型，但作为开放权重的基座模型，其多模态能力、高效推理以及Tinker微调平台使其成为良好的定制基础。
zh.summary: 本文介绍了Thinking Machines Lab发布的开放权重模型Inkling（975B总参数，41B活跃），采用Apache-2.0许可，具备多模态功能（文本、图像、音频、视频）。虽然并非前沿模型，但因其可微调性和竞争力，为美国开放权重生态增添了新选择。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：该模型定位为定制化基座而非最强模型，其价值在于Apache-2.0许可和Tinker平台微调能力，适合需要多模态基座的开发场景。

en.highlight: Inkling is not the strongest overall model available today, but its multimodal capabilities, efficient thinking, and availability on Tinker for fine-tuning make it a good open-weights base for customization.
en.summary: This article covers the release of Inkling, an open-weights model from Thinking Machines Lab with 975B total parameters (41B active), licensed under Apache-2.0, and trained on 45 trillion tokens of text, images, audio, and video. Though not a frontier model, it competes with Chinese open-weight models and is designed for fine-tuning via the Tinker platform.
en.failureAnalysis: The key takeaway: Inkling is positioned as a strong base model for customization rather than a top performer, with its value lying in its Apache-2.0 license, multimodal capabilities, and Tinker fine-tuning platform.
en.title: Inkling: Our open-weights model

articles.title: butterbase-ai/butterbase
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: Butterbase是一个开源的后端即服务平台，集成了数据库、认证、存储、云函数、AI网关和模型上下文协议，旨在简化AI应用的后端开发。其在GitHub上拥有2763星，近期活跃，值得关注其实际落地和社区发展。
articles.failureAnalysis: Butterbase面临Supabase等成熟BaaS的激烈竞争，用户迁移成本高；开源项目需要持续维护和社区支持，若功能迭代缓慢或文档不足，容易被边缘化。AI网关和MCP的具体实现尚待验证，可能只有少数开发者有实际需求。
articles.highlight: Postgres、认证、存储、函数、AI网关、MCP一体化，开源后端即服务。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2763 stars and recent public activity. Description: Open-source backend-as-a-service. Postgres, auth, storage, functions, AI gateway, MCP.

zh.title: Butterbase：开源后端即服务平台（含AI网关）
zh.highlight: Postgres、认证、存储、函数、AI网关、MCP一体化，开源后端即服务。
zh.summary: Butterbase是一个开源的后端即服务平台，集成了数据库、认证、存储、云函数、AI网关和模型上下文协议，旨在简化AI应用的后端开发。其在GitHub上拥有2763星，近期活跃，值得关注其实际落地和社区发展。
zh.failureAnalysis: Butterbase面临Supabase等成熟BaaS的激烈竞争，用户迁移成本高；开源项目需要持续维护和社区支持，若功能迭代缓慢或文档不足，容易被边缘化。AI网关和MCP的具体实现尚待验证，可能只有少数开发者有实际需求。

en.highlight: Postgres, auth, storage, functions, AI gateway, and MCP integrated into one open-source backend service.
en.summary: Butterbase is an open-source backend-as-a-service platform that combines database, authentication, storage, cloud functions, AI gateway, and Model Context Protocol, aiming to simplify backend development for AI applications. With 2763 stars on GitHub and recent activity, it's worth watching its real-world adoption and community growth.
en.failureAnalysis: Butterbase faces stiff competition from mature BaaS like Supabase, making user migration costly; as an open-source project, it requires sustained maintenance and community support, and may be sidelined if iteration is slow or documentation is lacking. The AI gateway and MCP implementations are unproven, potentially appealing only to niche developers.
en.title: Butterbase: Open-Source Backend as a Service with AI Gateway

articles.title: Leveraging unlabelled data for generalizable neural population decoding
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 解决的问题：这篇论文试图把 brain_computer_interface 方向的研究推进到更可用的场景。
paperCard.method: 解决方式：基于完整可读内容，概括它用什么模型、材料或系统流程解决问题。
paperCard.difference: 不同之处：重点看它是否比旧方法更稳定、更便宜、更准确或更容易部署。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点：把技术改进和真实应用目标连接起来，而不是只停留在理论指标。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现：先看输入数据，再看核心模型或装置，最后看实验验证结果。
paperCard.applications: 应用途径：优先关注医疗辅助、工业系统、智能硬件、能源设备等可落地方向。
technicalTerms: SNN：模仿神经脉冲时序的神经网络。
paperCard.whySelected: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

articles.highlight: 稳健且准确的神经解码器是脑机接口等神经技术的关键组成部分。
articles.summary: 该论文探讨如何利用未标记数据提升神经群体解码的泛化能力，这对于脑机接口等实际应用至关重要。通过利用大量未标记数据，有望减少对昂贵标记数据的依赖，提高解码器的鲁棒性。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该研究目前仅提供了初步方法，尚未在真实神经数据上进行充分验证。其泛化能力需进一步实验支持。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Leveraging unlabelled data for generalizable neural population decoding Ximeng Mao∗,1,2,B Nanda H Krishna∗,1,2,B Avery Hee-Woon Ryoo1,2 Matthew G Perich†,1,2 Guillaume Lajoie†,1,2,3,B 1Mila – Quebec AI Institute 2Université de Montréal 3Canada CIFAR AI Chair ∗Co-first authors †Co-senior authors Bximengmao@gmail.com,{nanda.harishankar-krishna,guillaume.lajoie}@mila.quebec Abstract Robust and accurate neural decoders are integral to neurotechnologies such as brain-computer interfaces and closed-loop experiments. Recent work has shown that tokenizing neural data at the spike level facilitates multi-session pretraining and delivers state-of-the-art decoding performance. However, current spike-based models are restricted to supervised learning (SL), limiting training to datasets with paired behavioural labels.

zh.title: 利用未标记数据实现可泛化的神经群体解码
zh.highlight: 稳健且准确的神经解码器是脑机接口等神经技术的关键组成部分。
zh.summary: 该论文探讨如何利用未标记数据提升神经群体解码的泛化能力，这对于脑机接口等实际应用至关重要。通过利用大量未标记数据，有望减少对昂贵标记数据的依赖，提高解码器的鲁棒性。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该研究目前仅提供了初步方法，尚未在真实神经数据上进行充分验证。其泛化能力需进一步实验支持。

paperCard.problem: 解决的问题：这篇论文试图把 brain_computer_interface 方向的研究推进到更可用的场景。
paperCard.method: 解决方式：基于完整可读内容，概括它用什么模型、材料或系统流程解决问题。
paperCard.difference: 不同之处：重点看它是否比旧方法更稳定、更便宜、更准确或更容易部署。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点：把技术改进和真实应用目标连接起来，而不是只停留在理论指标。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现：先看输入数据，再看核心模型或装置，最后看实验验证结果。
paperCard.applications: 应用途径：优先关注医疗辅助、工业系统、智能硬件、能源设备等可落地方向。
technicalTerms: SNN：模仿神经脉冲时序的神经网络。
paperCard.whySelected: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

en.title: Leveraging unlabelled data for generalizable neural population decoding
en.highlight: Robust and accurate neural decoders are integral to neurotechnologies such as brain-computer interfaces.
en.summary: This paper explores how to leverage unlabelled data to improve the generalization of neural population decoding, which is crucial for applications like brain-computer interfaces. By utilizing large amounts of unlabelled data, it aims to reduce reliance on expensive labelled data and enhance decoder robustness.
en.failureAnalysis: The study presents a preliminary method that has not been fully validated on real neural data. Its generalizability requires further experimental support.

paperCard.problem: Problem: use the paper card to identify the practical problem before judging the technique.
paperCard.method: Method: read the model, material, device, or system workflow as the proposed solution.
paperCard.difference: Difference: compare whether it is more stable, cheaper, more accurate, or easier to deploy than older methods.
paperCard.innovation: Innovation: focus on the link between the technical change and a real application goal.
paperCard.implementation: Implementation: check the input data, core model or device, and validation results.
paperCard.applications: Applications: look for realistic use in healthcare, industrial systems, smart hardware, or energy devices.
technicalTerms: SNN：模仿神经脉冲时序的神经网络。
paperCard.whySelected: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

articles.title: DBNN: Neural Spike Classification Using a Deep Binarized Neural Network
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 植入式脑机接口需要在芯片上对神经尖峰进行分类，以降低传输带宽和功耗，但传统方法计算复杂、硬件开销大。
paperCard.method: 采用深度二值化神经网络，将隐藏层的权重和激活限制为±1，用XNOR和popcount操作替代乘法，输出层保留高精度权重以保证分类准确率。
paperCard.difference: 之前的二值化网络（如Valencia和Alimohammad的工作）层数少、输入样本多（64个），准确率较低（约90%）；本文使用更深的网络（两层隐藏层各256神经元）和更紧凑的16样本输入，大幅提升准确率至98.7%。
paperCard.innovation: 首个为实时尖峰排序设计的深度二值化神经网络，通过批归一化参数折叠简化硬件，并在输出层省略Softmax，直接取logits的argmax。
paperCard.implementation: 输入16个8位整数量化样本；隐藏层权重存储为1位，用XNOR和加法树实现点积；输出层用定点权重和偏置产生三个logits。FPGA上50MHz时钟，每尖峰528周期（0.01ms），消耗828个ALM和0个DSP块。ASIC用FreePDK45工艺，面积0.014 mm²，20kHz下功耗122 nW。
paperCard.applications: 植入式脑机接口，实时神经信号处理，低功耗便携式神经设备。
technicalTerms: 尖峰排序：将检测到的神经放电波形归类到不同神经元。
二值化神经网络：权重和激活只用+1或-1表示，极大减少存储和计算。
XNOR+popcount：二值化网络中，用同或门和数1个数实现乘法累加。
批归一化折叠：训练时的批归一化参数在推理时合并到阈值中，不增加额外计算。

articles.highlight: 提出的DBNN尖峰分类器在0.014 mm²硅面积和122 nW功耗下实现98.7%的中位准确率，且无需乘法器。
articles.summary: 本文针对植入式脑机接口的低功耗需求，提出一种硬件导向的深度二值化神经网络（DBNN）用于神经尖峰分类。该方法通过将隐藏层权重和激活二值化，实现无乘法器推理，并在FPGA和ASIC上展示了极低的硬件成本与高准确率，适合植入式神经接口应用。
articles.failureAnalysis: 论文仅使用三个尖峰类别的数据集进行验证，且训练依赖标记数据，实际多类别或未知类别场景的性能尚未评估。
articles.sourceExcerpt: DBNN: Neural Spike Classification Using a Deep Binarized Neural Network Binyi Ren1, Luca M. Meyer1, and Majid Zamani1 1The School of Electronics and Computer Science (ECS), University of Southampton, Southampton SO17 1BJ, U.K. br1y24@soton.ac.uk, L.M.Meyer@soton.ac.uk, M.Zamani@soton.ac.uk Abstract.

zh.title: DBNN：使用深度二值化神经网络进行神经尖峰分类
zh.highlight: 提出的DBNN尖峰分类器在0.014 mm²硅面积和122 nW功耗下实现98.7%的中位准确率，且无需乘法器。
zh.summary: 本文针对植入式脑机接口的低功耗需求，提出一种硬件导向的深度二值化神经网络（DBNN）用于神经尖峰分类。该方法通过将隐藏层权重和激活二值化，实现无乘法器推理，并在FPGA和ASIC上展示了极低的硬件成本与高准确率，适合植入式神经接口应用。
zh.failureAnalysis: 论文仅使用三个尖峰类别的数据集进行验证，且训练依赖标记数据，实际多类别或未知类别场景的性能尚未评估。

paperCard.problem: 植入式脑机接口需要在芯片上对神经尖峰进行分类，以降低传输带宽和功耗，但传统方法计算复杂、硬件开销大。
paperCard.method: 采用深度二值化神经网络，将隐藏层的权重和激活限制为±1，用XNOR和popcount操作替代乘法，输出层保留高精度权重以保证分类准确率。
paperCard.difference: 之前的二值化网络（如Valencia和Alimohammad的工作）层数少、输入样本多（64个），准确率较低（约90%）；本文使用更深的网络（两层隐藏层各256神经元）和更紧凑的16样本输入，大幅提升准确率至98.7%。
paperCard.innovation: 首个为实时尖峰排序设计的深度二值化神经网络，通过批归一化参数折叠简化硬件，并在输出层省略Softmax，直接取logits的argmax。
paperCard.implementation: 输入16个8位整数量化样本；隐藏层权重存储为1位，用XNOR和加法树实现点积；输出层用定点权重和偏置产生三个logits。FPGA上50MHz时钟，每尖峰528周期（0.01ms），消耗828个ALM和0个DSP块。ASIC用FreePDK45工艺，面积0.014 mm²，20kHz下功耗122 nW。
paperCard.applications: 植入式脑机接口，实时神经信号处理，低功耗便携式神经设备。
technicalTerms: 尖峰排序：将检测到的神经放电波形归类到不同神经元。
二值化神经网络：权重和激活只用+1或-1表示，极大减少存储和计算。
XNOR+popcount：二值化网络中，用同或门和数1个数实现乘法累加。
批归一化折叠：训练时的批归一化参数在推理时合并到阈值中，不增加额外计算。

en.highlight: The proposed DBNN spike sorter achieves 98.7% median accuracy with 0.014 mm² silicon area and 122 nW power, and is multiplier-free.
en.summary: This paper presents a hardware-oriented deep binarized neural network for neural spike classification in implantable brain-computer interfaces. By binarizing hidden layer weights and activations, it enables multiplier-free inference, achieving high accuracy with extremely low hardware cost on FPGA and ASIC implementations.
en.failureAnalysis: The paper only evaluates on datasets with three spike classes, and performance on more classes or unknown spikes is not addressed.
en.title: DBNN: Neural Spike Classification Using a Deep Binarized Neural Network

paperCard.problem: Implantable brain-computer interfaces require on-chip spike sorting to reduce bandwidth and power, but conventional methods are computationally expensive.
paperCard.method: A deep binarized neural network with two binarized hidden layers (256 neurons each) and a fixed-point output layer, using XNOR and popcount for efficient inference.
paperCard.difference: Prior binarized networks used shallower architectures and 64-sample inputs with lower accuracy (~90%); this work uses deeper layers and 16-sample inputs, achieving 98.7% accuracy.
paperCard.innovation: First deep binarized neural network for real-time spike sorting, with batch normalization folded into thresholds and softmax omitted for hardware simplicity.
paperCard.implementation: 16 8-bit input samples; hidden weights stored as 1-bit, implemented via XNOR and adder tree; output layer uses fixed-point weights and biases. FPGA runs at 50 MHz, 528 cycles per spike, 828 ALMs, zero DSP. ASIC in 45 nm, 0.014 mm², 122 nW at 20 kHz.
paperCard.applications: Implantable brain-computer interfaces, real-time neural signal processing, low-power portable neural devices.
technicalTerms: spike sorting: assigning detected neural waveforms to individual neurons.
binarized neural network: weights and activations constrained to +1/-1, reducing memory and computation.
XNOR+popcount: bitwise XNOR and population count replace multiply-accumulate in binarized networks.
batch normalization folding: BN parameters merged into thresholds at inference, saving hardware.
